mapper.select: SELECT IB.INQUIRY_NO , IB.USER_ID , NICKNAME , INQUIRY_TITLE , INQUIRY_CONTENT , COUNT , IB.CREATE_DATE , IB.MODIFY_DATE , CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM INQUIRY_COMMENT IC WHERE IC.INQUIRY_NO = IB.INQUIRY_NO) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS HAS_COMMENT FROM INQUIRY_BOARD IB LEFT JOIN PLU_USER PU ON(IB.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID) WHERE IB.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY IB.CREATE_DATE DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRY_BOARD WHERE STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INQUIRY_BOARD WHERE INQUIRY_NO = #{inquiryNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRY_BOARD SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE STATUS = 'Y' AND INQUIRY_NO= #{inquiryNo}
mapper.select: SELECT INQUIRY_NO , IB.USER_ID , NICKNAME , INQUIRY_TITLE , INQUIRY_CONTENT , COUNT , IB.CREATE_DATE , IB.MODIFY_DATE FROM INQUIRY_BOARD IB LEFT JOIN PLU_USER PU ON(IB.USER_ID = PU.USER_ID) WHERE IB.STATUS = 'Y' AND INQUIRY_NO = #{inquiryNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRY_BOARD SET STATUS = 'N' , MODIFY_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE INQUIRY_NO = #{inquiryNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
